overall.description: First-person exploration of a modern cyberpunk apartment in a video game, featuring an office with holographic displays and wall-mounted screens, transitioning through a minimalist living room to a bedroom with panoramic red neon city views.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern home office with executive desk and holographic displays

events.description: wall-mounted screen activates displaying a silhouetted walking figure
screen content changes to display a white X symbol on gray background

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the office space, observing the wall screen and desk area from different angles

entered.detail: black marble-topped desk with metallic frame and holographic interface
tall white modular shelving unit with multiple compartments
matching white shelving unit against the right wall
large rectangular display showing changing video content
black leather ergonomic chair behind the desk
large horizontal artwork with green and red abstract patterns
futuristic transparent display hovering above the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit modern home office with a large executive desk at the center. A wall-mounted screen cycles through display modes, showing first a walking figure then an X symbol. White bookshelves line the walls and an abstract painting hangs to the right as the camera explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor between office and living area

events.description: camera approaches desk computer closely, revealing interactive USE prompt on screen
moving through doorway from office into darker corridor leading to living space

agents.ego_description: approaching the desk computer for interaction then proceeding through the doorway into the adjacent living area

entered.detail: circular glass-top coffee table with metallic base
tall rectangular white floor lamp emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the desk computer, revealing an interactive prompt, then transitions through a doorway into a corridor. The office furniture falls behind as the living room comes into view with a coffee table, sofa, and illuminated floor lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: minimalist living room with ambient lighting

events.description: red neon light from exterior becomes visible through window ahead, shifting ambient color

agents.ego_description: walking through the living room toward the bedroom area, passing the coffee table and sofa

entered.detail: low-profile bed with white linens and integrated lighting underneath
large panoramic window showing red neon-lit cityscape outside
horizontal slatted blinds partially covering the window

segments.scene_description: Moving through the minimalist living room, the camera passes the coffee table and sofa as red neon light begins to spill in from a large window ahead. The platform bed becomes visible to the right as the scene transitions toward the bedroom area.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom with panoramic red-lit city view

events.description: camera slows and approaches the bed, focusing on details of the bedding
camera focuses closely on magazine lying open on the bed

agents.ego_description: approaching the bed and examining the magazine and the red neon cityscape visible through the window

entered.detail: open magazine with visible text and images lying on the white bedspread

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the bedroom dominated by a platform bed and a massive red-tinted window revealing a neon-lit cityscape. Moving slowly toward the bed, the focus shifts to an open magazine on the white linens, with the ambient red glow illuminating the room's dark interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit modern apartment that transitions from a functional home office into a bedroom bathed in red neon light. It begins by exploring a dark office space featuring white bookshelves, an abstract painting, and a wall-mounted screen cycling through holographic symbols. As the camera moves close to the executive desk, it glides through a doorway and into a corridor, leaving the office behind to reveal a minimalist living room with a sofa and an illuminated floor lamp. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the living room furniture, guided by a growing red glow spilling from a large window ahead. Finally, the movement enters the bedroom, where the focus settles on an open magazine atop a platform bed against the backdrop of a massive, neon-lit cityscape.
